summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; import java.io.IOException; public class ServerManager { private static ServerManager instance; private EvolutionServer server; private int currentPort = 48080; private ServerManager() {} public static synchronized ServerManager getInstance() { if (instance == null) { instance = new ServerManager(); } return instance; } public synchronized void start(int port) throws IOException { if (server != null) { stop(); } this.currentPort = port; server = new EvolutionServer(port); server.startServer();
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
